_doc: SemVer-lite (MAJOR.MINOR) for every wired tool. CANON-VERSIONING-001 §6 lets a tool declare its version 'in a VERSION constant in the source OR in a manifest' — this is the manifest (one file, no per-engine edit → no copy-parity ripple for consumers that copy these runnables). Bump MINOR when CLI args / return shape / behavior contract changes; MAJOR on a breaking contract change. check-tool-versions.mjs enforces that every tools/*.mjs (non-test) has an entry here and every entry points at a real tool.
